messages.content: Joke about Ethiopia china, cement

To thank them for all the concrete opportunities!

Joke, Ethiopia, China, cement factory

Why did the Ethiopian cement factory hire Chinese workers?

Because they wanted to cement their bond with China!
中国人，埃塞人，笑话

为什么中国人邀请埃塞俄比亚人一起吃饭？

因为他们想让他们“好吃一顿”！（好吃一顿的发音和好的关系很近）
在埃塞的中国人有多少人
根据2017年的数据，大约有约10,000名中国公民生活和工作在埃塞俄比亚。
How many Chinese people in Africa

As of 2021, it is estimated that there are over one million Chinese people living and working in African countries. The majority of the Chinese population in Africa are comprised of entrepreneurs, investors, and skilled workers.
How many Ethiopian people
As of 2021, the estimated population of Ethiopia is around 117 million people.

Jokes for adults

As an AI language model, I cannot provide inappropriate or offensive jokes. However, here are some clean jokes that are suitable for adults:

1. Why do seagulls fly over the sea? Because if they flew over the bay, they'd be bagels!

2. Why did the tomato turn red? Because it saw the salad dressing!

3. Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!

4. Why did the math book look sad? Because it had too many problems.

5. Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!

6. What's the difference between a poorly dressed man on a trampoline and a well-dressed man on a trampoline? Attire.

7. Why did the coffee file a police report? It got mugged!

8. Why was the math book sad? Because it had too many problems.

9. How does Moses make coffee? Hebrews it!

10. What do you get when you cross a snowman and a shark? Frostbite.
A story for 20 yo, about adventure, love, money, entertainment

Once upon a time, in a bustling city, there was a young man named Jake. He was twenty years old and was looking for an adventure that would change his life. Jake was a smart and ambitious young man who always followed his dreams.

One day, he met a girl named Lily at a local coffee shop. She was also interested in adventure and travel. As they got to know each other, they discovered they had much in common and decided to go on an adventure together.

They decided to head to the Caribbean and explore the exotic islands. Jake and Lily worked hard and saved money for months to make this adventure possible.

Finally, they set sail to the beautiful islands, staying in small beach huts, swimming in crystal-clear waters and exploring the local markets. But as fun as it was, they realized that the trip wasn't cheap, and they were running out of money.

Still determined to make the most of their adventure, Jake had the idea of performing at some of the local clubs as a musician. His musical talent impressed the locals, and soon they started booking him for gigs all around the island.

With the money he made, Jake was able to pay for their living expenses and continue their journey. Lily helped Jake with his shows and they enjoyed the experience together even more.

As their adventure continued, Jake and Lily grew closer and started having feelings for each other. Their love for each other made their adventure even more magical and unforgettable.

In the end, the couple returned home, feeling richer in experience and love, with memories they would cherish forever. Even though they had made many sacrifices, the adventure was worth it, and soon they began planning for the next one. Together, they built a life of excitement, travel, and love, always following their dreams and taking chances.
How to buy a good laptop, recommend

When buying a good laptop, there are several factors to consider to make sure you make the right choice. Here are some tips to keep in mind:

1. Purpose: Determine what the laptop will be used for. If it's for general home and office use, a mid-range specification laptop would suffice. However, if you will be using it for gaming or video editing, then you may need a high-end specification laptop.

2. Budget: Determine how much you are willing to spend on a laptop.

3. Processor: Look for a laptop with a powerful processor, such as an Intel i5 or i7 or an AMD Ryzen processor.

4. RAM: Look for a laptop with at least 8GB of RAM, though 16GB is recommended for heavy use.

5. Storage: Look for a laptop with a SSD (solid-state drive) rather than an HDD (hard disk drive). SSDs provide faster read and write speeds which can significantly improve the overall performance of your laptop. A storage size of at least 256GB is recommended for most users.

6. Display: Look for a laptop with a high-resolution display.

7. Battery life: Look for a laptop with a long battery life, especially if you will be using it on-the-go.

8. Brand: Look for a reputable brand with good customer support.

As for recommendations, some good laptops that fit the criteria above include:

1. Dell XPS 13
2. HP Spectre x360
3. Lenovo Yoga C940
4. Asus ZenBook UX425
5. MacBook Air M1
How about apple VR headset

As of now, there has been no official announcement from Apple regarding the release or launch of VR headset. However, there are rumors and reports that Apple is currently working on a VR headset which could be launched in the near future. According to some reports, the Apple VR headset would feature advanced technology such as LiDAR sensors, high-resolution displays, and a powerful processor. 

It is also rumored that the Apple VR headset would be more expensive than other VR headsets currently available in the market, like Oculus Rift and HTC Vive. However, we will have to wait for an official announcement from Apple to know more about these speculations.
How about oculus quest 3

As of now, there has been no official announcement from Oculus regarding the release or launch of Oculus Quest 3. However, it is expected that Oculus Quest 3 will be an upgraded version of the Quest 2 VR headset with more advanced features and technology. 

Some rumors suggest that the Oculus Quest 3 could feature a 120Hz display, improved battery life, more storage capacity, and Qualcomm's Snapdragon XR3 processor. It is also expected that the Oculus Quest 3 would be wireless and standalone, without the need for a PC or wires to operate.

However, as mentioned earlier, there has been no official announcement or confirmation from Oculus about the Oculus Quest 3 release date or the expected specifications. So, we will have to wait for an official announcement from Oculus to know more about the Oculus Quest 3.
